case.narrative: I received a notice and I’m trying to figure out what’s real and what I need to prove before I act.
unknowns: Is the program actually HUD-VASH or something else?

updates: Case review mode: INTAKE_REVIEW (truth review, not authorship).
Key facts are missing; treat recommendations as verification steps.
Deadline risk flagged; confirm dates from the notice/artifact.

warnings.label: Some items appear in both known facts and unknowns.
Program name is present but not supported by an attached artifact.
warnings.details: Program listed: HUD-VASH. Attach a letter/portal screenshot if available.

battle_buddy_plan.situation:
I received a notice and I’m trying to figure out what’s real and what I need to prove before I act.
Known facts (as stated): User received a written notice; Deadline date is unclear; Program may be HUD-VASH
Unknowns / questions: Deadline date is unclear; Who issued the notice?; Is the program actually HUD-VASH or something else?
Artifacts present (types): NOTICE_TO_VACATE
battle_buddy_plan.goal: Intake review: separate stated facts from unknowns and define required evidence.
next_3_actions: Review the intake for completeness: verify each stated fact is supported by an artifact or clearly marked as unverified.
Prioritize the top 3 unknowns and define exactly what evidence would answer each.
Check whether any written deadlines exist (notice/email/portal) and capture dates.
evidence_needed: Lease or rental agreement (if applicable), redacted.
Relevant email/text thread screenshots showing dates/requests (redact phone numbers if needed).
Program documentation you have (letters, portal screenshots) that state the program name and status.
A one-page timeline: key dates, who you contacted, outcomes.
risks_traps: This output is review-oriented; a human must decide any next steps.
Privacy: don’t share SSN, bank details, passwords/MFA codes, or full unredacted DD-214 in messages.
Use redactions (last-4 only) when sharing documents or screenshots.
if_blocked_do_this: If you get stuck, collect the missing document or ask the responsible agency for the exact requirement in writing.
